module:
Unit tests for error recovery and edge cases in vector operations.

These tests verify the system's behavior under failure conditions
and edge cases, ensuring graceful degradation and proper error handling.

test_connection_failure_recovery.docstring: Test behavior when database connection fails.

test_invalid_backend_type_handling.docstring: Test handling of invalid backend types.

test_dimension_mismatch_handling.docstring: Test graceful handling of dimension mismatch errors.

test_invalid_metric_handling.docstring: Test handling of invalid similarity metrics.

test_concurrent_collection_creation.docstring: Test handling of concurrent collection creation attempts.

test_service_error_isolation.docstring: Test that errors in one operation don't affect subsequent operations.

test_duplicate_id_handling.docstring: Test handling of duplicate IDs in store operations.
